---
name: 'User Story 1 '
about: "(Runner / Visitor)"
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

In order to **share my opinion on running events** as a **site visitor**, I can **vote in a poll and leave a comment (anonymously if I choose)**.

**Acceptance Criteria**

- The poll must be displayed on the homepage for all site visitors.
- The user must be able to select one poll option and submit their vote.

**Tasks**

- [ ] Create poll section structure using HTML
- [ ] Style poll layout and form elements using CSS
- [ ] Add radio button options in HTML form
- [ ] Add anonymous voting checkbox using HTML
- [ ] Add comment input field using HTML textarea
- [ ] Use JavaScript to validate form submission (prevent voting without selecting an option)
- [ ] Use JavaScript to submit vote data (option + anonymous choice + comment)
- [ ] Store vote details in backend/database (e.g., JSON file / database)
- [ ] Display confirmation message using JavaScript after successful submission
